TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == kakaliman == Kalitang "ŤäĪÁĒü" Kalitang u cacay nu amilika a sinbun mutulin a mangga , misulitay sa ci cal-se.su-ce Charles M. Schulz). " ¬∑ŤąíŤĆ≤(Charles M. Schulz). "Kalitang" u misamangaay macakat i naemekan nu pinaay a wayway a mangga , namakay 1950 a mihcaan 10 abulad 2 ademiad malingatu patahekal . Katukuh 2000 a mihcaan 2 abulad 13 ademiad ya misulitay hayni kapatay , pulung mutulin 17,897 ku cudad . Śąį2000ŚĻī2śúą13 17,897ŚĻÖ. ya mangga makayni nu se-nu-pi a wacu ca-li sa-li nay-le-se lu-si siy-le-te pay-ti ma-si hulan-ke-li a papinaay a micudaday nu adidi'ay ku han , pakaynien nu nikaudip nu wawa kusapisulit tina aadihan , miadih tu madayumay macalilaway nu kitakit . (Schroeder),šĹ©Ťíā ,ÁĎ™Ť•Ņ(Marcie), . misulitay ci calse.suce nitekaan nida a patadas misulit tu tatengaay nu sayku atu nu udip nipitanam misaadidi' tu maminay a wayway nu tademaw . u sulit ilabu idaw ku sakanawlan nu maudipay a sasakamun , muucul tu balucu' nu tademaw "idaw ku wayway nu mulatlatay" atu i mataay nu wawa nuni kaudip tu cayay kaedem . namakayniay a nasulitan nasakamuan atu natinengan:
S.PHON: == kakar~…ĺiman == kar~…ĺitaŇč "**" kar~…ĺitaŇč u ¶a ¶aj nu amir~…ĺika a sinbun mutur~…ĺin a maŇčga , misur~…ĺitaj sa ¶i ¶ar~…ĺ-s…ô.su- ¶…ô ¶ńßarr~…ĺ…ôs m. s ¶ńßur~…ĺz). " ***( ¶ńßarr~…ĺ…ôs m. s ¶ńßur~…ĺz). "kar~…ĺitaŇč" u misamaŇčaaj ma ¶akat i na…ôm…ôkan nu pinaaj a wajwaj a maŇčga , namakaj **** a mińß ¶aan ** abur~…ĺad * ad…ômiad mar~…ĺiŇčatu patańß…ôkar~…ĺ . katukuńß **** a mińß ¶aan * abur~…ĺad ** ad…ômiad ja misur~…ĺitaj ńßajni kapataj , pur~…ĺuŇč mutur~…ĺin **,*** ku ¶udad . ********** **,****. ja maŇčga makajni nu s…ô-nu-pi a wa ¶u ¶a-r~…ĺi sa-r~…ĺi naj-r~…ĺ…ô-s…ô r~…ĺu-si sij-r~…ĺ…ô-t…ô paj-ti ma-si ńßur~…ĺan-k…ô-r~…ĺi a papinaaj a mi ¶udadaj nu adidi Ē~ °aj ku ńßan , pakajni…ôn nu nikaudip nu wawa kusapisur~…ĺit tina aadińßan , miadińß tu madajumaj ma ¶ar~…ĺir~…ĺawaj nu kitakit . (s ¶ńßro…ôd…ôr),** ,**(mar ¶i…ô), . misur~…ĺitaj ¶i ¶ar~…ĺs…ô.su ¶…ô nit…ôkaan nida a patadas misur~…ĺit tu tat…ôŇčaaj nu sajku atu nu udip nipitanam misaadidi Ē~ ° tu maminaj a wajwaj nu tad…ômaw . u sur~…ĺit ir~…ĺabu idaw ku sakanawr~…ĺan nu maudipaj a sasakamun , muu ¶ur~…ĺ tu bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° nu tad…ômaw "idaw ku wajwaj nu mur~…ĺatr~…ĺataj" atu i mataaj nu wawa nuni kaudip tu ¶ajaj ka…ôd…ôm . namakajniaj a nasur~…ĺitan nasakamuan atu natin…ôŇčan:
S.FORM: == kakaliman == Kalitang "ŤäĪÁĒü" Kalitang u cacay nu amilika a sinbun mutulin a mangga , misulitay sa ci cal-se.su-ce Charles M. Schulz). " ¬∑ŤąíŤĆ≤(Charles M. Schulz). "Kalitang" u misamangaay macakat i naemekan nu pinaay a wayway a mangga , namakay 1950 a mihcaan 10 abulad 2 ademiad malingatu patahekal . Katukuh 2000 a mihcaan 2 abulad 13 ademiad ya misulitay hayni kapatay , pulung mutulin 17,897 ku cudad . Śąį2000ŚĻī2śúą13 17,897ŚĻÖ. ya mangga makayni nu se-nu-pi a wacu ca-li sa-li nay-le-se lu-si siy-le-te pay-ti ma-si hulan-ke-li a papinaay a micudaday nu adidi'ay ku han , pakaynien nu nikaudip nu wawa kusapisulit tina aadihan , miadih tu madayumay macalilaway nu kitakit . (Schroeder),šĹ©Ťíā ,ÁĎ™Ť•Ņ(Marcie), . misulitay ci calse.suce nitekaan nida a patadas misulit tu tatengaay nu sayku atu nu udip nipitanam misaadidi' tu maminay a wayway nu tademaw . u sulit ilabu idaw ku sakanawlan nu maudipay a sasakamun , muucul tu balucu' nu tademaw "idaw ku wayway nu mulatlatay" atu i mataay nu wawa nuni kaudip tu cayay kaedem . namakayniay a nasulitan nasakamuan atu natinengan:
S.PHON: == kakar~…ĺiman == kar~…ĺitaŇč "**" kar~…ĺitaŇč u ¶a ¶aj nu amir~…ĺika a sinbun mutur~…ĺin a maŇčga , misur~…ĺitaj sa ¶i ¶ar~…ĺ-s…ô.su- ¶…ô ¶ńßarr~…ĺ…ôs m. s ¶ńßur~…ĺz). " ***( ¶ńßarr~…ĺ…ôs m. s ¶ńßur~…ĺz). "kar~…ĺitaŇč" u misamaŇčaaj ma ¶akat i na…ôm…ôkan nu pinaaj a wajwaj a maŇčga , namakaj **** a mińß ¶aan ** abur~…ĺad * ad…ômiad mar~…ĺiŇčatu patańß…ôkar~…ĺ . katukuńß **** a mińß ¶aan * abur~…ĺad ** ad…ômiad ja misur~…ĺitaj ńßajni kapataj , pur~…ĺuŇč mutur~…ĺin **,*** ku ¶udad . ********** **,****. ja maŇčga makajni nu s…ô-nu-pi a wa ¶u ¶a-r~…ĺi sa-r~…ĺi naj-r~…ĺ…ô-s…ô r~…ĺu-si sij-r~…ĺ…ô-t…ô paj-ti ma-si ńßur~…ĺan-k…ô-r~…ĺi a papinaaj a mi ¶udadaj nu adidi Ē~ °aj ku ńßan , pakajni…ôn nu nikaudip nu wawa kusapisur~…ĺit tina aadińßan , miadińß tu madajumaj ma ¶ar~…ĺir~…ĺawaj nu kitakit . (s ¶ńßro…ôd…ôr),** ,**(mar ¶i…ô), . misur~…ĺitaj ¶i ¶ar~…ĺs…ô.su ¶…ô nit…ôkaan nida a patadas misur~…ĺit tu tat…ôŇčaaj nu sajku atu nu udip nipitanam misaadidi Ē~ ° tu maminaj a wajwaj nu tad…ômaw . u sur~…ĺit ir~…ĺabu idaw ku sakanawr~…ĺan nu maudipaj a sasakamun , muu ¶ur~…ĺ tu bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° nu tad…ômaw "idaw ku wajwaj nu mur~…ĺatr~…ĺataj" atu i mataaj nu wawa nuni kaudip tu ¶ajaj ka…ôd…ôm . namakajniaj a nasur~…ĺitan nasakamuan atu natin…ôŇčan:
